title: POV: You Just Unlocked Ritual x Masonry
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~10s. Featured brand: Ritual. Inspired by mobileeditingclub (DSLr0gzCHof). Build-it-in-Masonry walkthrough.
concept: A build-it-in-Masonry POV reel for Ritual vitamins. The finished reel is a fast, satisfying run of product shots, but every frame is generated in Masonry following the 'Make in Masonry' step under each beat. The hook is a relatable lifestyle portrait, then the screen floods with 'Yes, that's Masonry' over a floating capsule, a capsule pile, a tweezer shot, a branded bottle card. Every shot looks like a six-figure studio day, all generated.
audio: Upbeat, punchy trending audio. Audio-only: no voiceover. On-screen text is the full narrative.

beats.ost: POV: You finally learned how to generate your brand content with Masonry
beats.visual: Two frames: woman holding a Ritual capsule up playfully, then tilting it toward camera. Bright, relatable lifestyle energy.
beats.masonry: Upload Ritual's Essential capsule and bottle to the Masonry product library. Prompt 'relatable lifestyle portrait, woman holding capsule up to the light, bright clean tone, 9:16.' Generate the hook, lay the POV text across both frames.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 0-1: 'POV: You finally learned how to generate content with AI' lifestyle hook.

beats.visual: Ritual Essential capsule floating on a clean light-gray background, crisp capsule detail. Two cuts hold the reveal.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'single capsule floating, clean light-gray seamless, studio product light.' Generate, this is the first 'Yes, that's Masonry' reveal.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 2-3: 'Yes, that's AI' on the floating green capsule.

beats.visual: Minimalist flat-lay: Ritual packaging and small print card on a neutral background.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'minimalist flat-lay, Ritual packaging plus print card, neutral background.' Generate; matches Ritual's transparency aesthetic.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 4: 'Yes, that's AI' on the packaging flat-lay.

beats.visual: Natural ingredient macro: rich green algae/spirulina texture, hyperreal close-up.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'natural ingredient macro, algae texture, rich green.' Generate; ties to Ritual's traceable-ingredient story.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 5: 'Yes, that's AI' on the natural ingredient macro.

beats.visual: Model close-up placing a capsule on her tongue, freckled skin, warm natural light.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'model close-up placing capsule on tongue, freckled skin, warm light.' Masonry keeps it lifestyle-real, not stocky.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 6: 'Yes, that's AI' on the lifestyle model close-up.

beats.visual: Capsule pile macro: dozens of Ritual capsules filling the frame, each catching light.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'capsule pile macro filling frame, each catching light.' Generate; tactile and satisfying.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 7: 'Yes, that's AI' on the capsule pile macro.

beats.visual: Tweezer holding a single capsule over a plain background: precise, minimal, catalog-quality.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'tweezer holding one capsule over plain seamless.' Generate the catalog-quality product shot.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 8: 'Yes, that's AI' on the product tweezer shot.

beats.visual: Final frame: Ritual bottle and branded product card on a warm cream background. Full brand system, no shoot.
beats.masonry: Prompt 'Ritual bottle plus branded product card, warm cream background.' Each shot above is one Masonry generation: cut them fast on the beat for the satisfying run.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration sec 9: 'Yes, that's AI' on the final branded bottle and card.

notes: Editor workflow: (1) Load Ritual's products (Essential capsule, bottle, packaging) into the Masonry product library and set the minimalist brand palette. (2) Generate each beat with its 'Make in Masonry' prompt: these are all fast single-product generations, so batch them. (3) Assemble in your editor to the trending audio, cut hard on the beat, lay the repeating 'Yes, that's Masonry' text, audio-only with no voiceover. Ritual is a stand-in demo brand: swap in the real client. No media generated yet, generation is gated on separate approval per project policy.
